description: You are a civil engineer at a transportation consulting firm hired by the City of Bologna to design a traffic calming zone in the Acosta corridor residential area. Using the SUMO scenario at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/, evaluate the impact of implementing a 30 km/h (8.33 m/s) speed limit on at least 8 residential edges. Record baseline simulation metrics (average speed, travel times, and total throughput) to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_tripinfos.xml. After modifying the network to include the new speed limits and any optional traffic calming features—such as 20 km/h speed bumps on at least 2 edges or turn restrictions—save the modified simulation results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/calming_tripinfos.xml. Produce a comparison report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/traffic_calming_report.csv with columns for metric, baseline_value, calming_value, and change_pct, covering zone_avg_speed, corridor_avg_travel_time, total_throughput, zone_85th_percentile_speed, and corridor_avg_speed. Document the zone design and its impacts in a professional engineering summary at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/traffic_calming_summary.txt.
